query: I've read three blog posts that all say different things about whether Next.js App Router supports streaming SSR. What's true?
expected_behavior: Identifies the contradiction explicitly and names it as the finding
Consults the primary source (Next.js official docs / release notes) to resolve the contradiction
Presents both conflicting claims with their sources before stating the resolution
Notes which source is more current or authoritative
Does not fabricate confidence — if the answer is still ambiguous after primary source check, states that explicitly
